title: Artin Approximation Theorem Through EML

analysis.object: T757: Artin Approximation Theorem Through EML depth analysis

artin_statement.description: Artin 1969: formal solution to system -> algebraic solution approximating it
artin_statement.reason: EML-0 algebraic solution exists given EML-2 formal approximation

formal_solution.description: Formal power series solution: EML-2 (power series = measurement/enumeration)

depth_jump.description: Artin: EML-2 -> EML-0 descent (DOWNWARD depth jump by 2)
depth_jump.reason: Delta_d = -2 descent: same as measure theorem in reverse

berkovich_compatibility.description: Berkovich spaces admit formal models -- formal schemes over valuation ring

artin_for_berkovich.description: If Berkovich cycle has formal model, Artin gives algebraic cycle
artin_for_berkovich.reason: Formal model + Artin = algebraization -- conditional on formal model existence

t757_theorem.description: T757: Artin approximation works for Berkovich cycles that have formal models. Gap = formal model existence for tropical cycles.
t757_theorem.reason: Artin is applicable IF formal model exists -- new sub-target

analysis.theorem: T757: Artin Approximation Theorem Through EML (S1036).

key_theorem: T757: Artin Approximation Theorem Through EML (S1036).
